description:
Eiyu is confused after being kissed by Haru and Shio. Shio and Eiyu become sports day committee members.
Source: Crunchyroll

titles.title: Feeling the Afterglow Kiss After Kiss? Become a Sports Day Committee Member? Still Won`t Start a Rom-Com
Kiss Shite mo Mata Kiss Shite mo Yoin ni Hitatte mo Taiikusai Jikkou Iin de mo Lovecome ni Naranai
キスしてもまたキスしても余韻に浸っても体育祭実行委員でもラブコメにならない
